creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Test fails due to a missing dependency:

[00:00:06] Error: cad/py-cadquery depends on nonexistent origin 'math/py-nptyping'; Please contact maintainer of the port to fix this.

This means bug #259507 and bug #259596 need to be committed first.  The latter is currently awaiting maintainer feedback from you.
